conditions.critical_condition_basis: coelution point of ring or linear polymers with different molecular weights
conditions.evidence_text: LCCC Fractionation of Ring PS. For fractionation of ring PS, two C18 bonded silica columns (Nucleosil C18, 250 × 9.8 mm, 100 Å pore, 5 μm and Nucleosil C18, 250 × 9.8 mm, 300 Å pore, 5 μm) and a mixed eluent of CH2Cl2/CH3CN (58/42, v/v, Samchun, HPLC grade) at a flow rate of 2 mL/min were used. The temperature of the columns was set at 19 °C at which different molar mass linear PS precursors coelute.
conditions.physical_address: Department of Chemistry, The University of Memphis, Memphis, Tennessee 38154, United States; Division of Advanced Materials Science and Department of Chemistry, Pohang University of Science and Technology (POSTECH), Pohang 37673, Korea

conditions.evidence_text: Analytical LCCC analysis used a column (Nucleosil C18, 250 x 4.6 mm, 100 Å, 5 μm) smaller than the preparative fractionation. The eluent was CH2Cl2/CH3CN (58/42, v/v) at a flow rate of 0.5 mL/min. The column temperature was varied to achieve CAP condition for the polymers of interest. TCAP and tE,CAP of Ls-PS... are measured as 14.8 °C/7.4 min
conditions.analyte_polymer: Ls-PS (linear polystyrene with saturated DPE end-groups)
conditions.notes: Ls-PS refers to linear PS with saturated end-groups recovered from ring purification.
conditions.detector: light scattering detector and UV absorption detector
conditions.physical_address: Department of Chemistry, The University of Memphis, Memphis, Tennessee 38154, United States; Division of Advanced Materials Science and Department of Chemistry, Pohang University of Science and Technology (POSTECH), Pohang 37673, Korea
